meta.title: Cadence Gallery — Practice tools for musicians
meta.description: The home of Cadence Metronome and Cadence Polypulse: practice apps for musicians, crafted with care and an obsession for detail.

hero.tagline: Practice tools for musicians, crafted with care and an obsession for detail.

apps.title: Two instruments, one identity
apps.description: Every Cadence app comes from the same idea: give musicians precise, clear, distraction-free tools.

metronome.name: Cadence Metronome
metronome.tagline: A precision metronome with low-latency audio, handcrafted themes and a sequencer for serious practice.

polypulse.name: Cadence Polypulse
polypulse.tagline: A polyrhythm trainer: up to three synced voices, a ring visualizer and guided routines.

items.title: The Cadence Gallery site is under construction
items.body: We're building the brand's home: app showcases, usage guides and legal documentation.

items.title: Cadence Metronome is now multilingual
items.body: The app is now available in Spanish and English, along with sequencer improvements.

items.title: Cadence Polypulse in development
items.body: The polyrhythm trainer is progressing, with its Coach mode and precision routines.

about.title: A carefully made project, by someone who sweats the details
about.body: Cadence Gallery is an independent studio focused on musical tools. Not a mass-market product — it's author's work, made for musicians who practice seriously. If you have feedback, ideas, or found something to improve, get in touch.
